fields.label: Connection String
fields.helpText: MongoDB connection URI from Atlas or your self-hosted instance

fields.label: Database Name
fields.helpText: Default database to connect to (can also be in connection string)

metadata.summary: MongoDB document database with flexible schemas, aggregation pipelines, and Atlas cloud.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. For Atlas: go to cloud.mongodb.com -> Database -> Connect -> Drivers
2. Copy the connection string (mongodb+srv://...)
3. Replace <password> with your database user password
4. Optionally specify the default database name
5. For self-hosted: use mongodb://user:pass@host:27017/dbname
